Delivery Intelligence owns scope synthesis and live-actionability.
Tribunal starts only after that boundary.

div.style: color: rgb(22, 58, 99) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Missing reasoning cache on sync or dashboard refresh stays deterministic.
Provider-backed enrichment is reserved for explicit Tribunal reasoning flows.
